name: @siteimprove/alfa
description: Suite of open and standards-based tools for performing reliable accessibility conformance testing at scale

scripts.#coverage:comment: We use --coverage.enabled instead of --coverage to allow overriding options in the CLI. See warning at https://vitest.dev/config/#coverage
scripts.#coverage:package:comment: Run coverage for a single package. Usage: yarn workspace @siteimprove/alfa-foo coverage:package.
scripts.#coverage:package:hack: coverage.include expects a relative path but INIT_CWD is an absolute path; hence the sed. We add back the files extensions to avoid irrelevant files that print error messages. The external quotes ensure the glob pattern are not expanded by the shell. The internal quotes live in another shell instance due to the $(), so everyting is fine.

comment-resolution: Circumventing https://github.com/vitest-dev/vitest/issues/9876 until it is fixed upstream.
